overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a frontier town at night. The character moves from a narrow alleyway between wooden buildings onto the main dirt street, passing by a horse-drawn carriage and encountering a horseback rider.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway between wooden frontier buildings

events.description: approaching the end of the covered alleyway, light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow passage between the pink house and the cargo building, moving toward the open street

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with pink siding and green shutters
stacked wooden cargo containers and barrels
white wooden picket fence running along the property line
dark wooden building with balcony and 'CARGO PICK UP' signage
potted plants hanging from the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered alleyway between a pink two-story wooden house and a dark cargo building. Wooden barrels and crates line the left side, while hanging plants dangle from the overhead cover. The passage is dimly lit by warm lantern light as the character approaches the opening to the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt main street of frontier town

events.description: exits the covered alleyway into the open town street
emerging from shadow into the open night air with visible sky

agents.ego_description: stepping out from the alley and surveying the open town street, continuing to walk toward the center of the dirt road

notable_agents.action: horse standing still, tied to the white picket fence

entered.detail: brown horse tethered to the white picket fence
single-story wooden house with lit windows across the street
wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered passage into the open night air of the frontier town. A horse stands tied to the fence on the left, while wooden buildings with glowing windows line the dirt street ahead. Telegraph poles stretch into the distance as the character walks toward the center of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with wooden storefronts and saloon

events.description: horse-drawn wooden carriage enters from the left and passes by
carriage continues moving past and exits to the right

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the dirt main street, observing the passing carriage and the town buildings

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from left to right across the street

entered.detail: wooden wagon with driver being pulled by two horses
elaborately decorated wooden building with balcony and warm lighting
row of wooden commercial buildings with porches and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the wide dirt main street as a horse-drawn carriage passes by from left to right. An ornate saloon building with decorative woodwork stands on the right, while various wooden storefronts line the left side of the street. The scene is illuminated by warm lantern light against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street continuing toward residential area

events.description: rider on horseback appears in the distance approaching from ahead
horseback rider passes by the character on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the dirt road toward the edge of town, approaching and passing a horseback rider

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from down the road

entered.detail: person riding a horse toward the camera
white two-story house with lit windows in the distance
abandoned wooden wagon on the side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the main street as a horseback rider approaches from the distance and passes by on the right. The ornate saloon building recedes to the left rear as the character moves toward the outskirts of town, passing a wooden cart and approaching a white house in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a claustrophobic, dimly lit alleyway into the expansive night air of a frontier town. It begins within a narrow covered passage between a pink wooden house and a cargo building, moving past barrels and hanging plants under the glow of warm lanterns. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens onto a wide dirt street lined with telegraph poles and wooden buildings with glowing windows. The camera then follows the character down the main road, passing a horse-drawn carriage and an ornate saloon before a horseback rider approaches and passes by on the right. Finally, the town center recedes as the character moves toward the outskirts, passing a wooden cart and heading toward a distant white house under the dark night sky.
